description: Orchestrator + 9 standalone diagnostic skills (Execution + Diagnostic + Standards layers of the creative-strategy framework). Each skill is independently callable. The orchestrator runs the full diagnostic on one creative or every creative in a test set, reading the workspace's brand-audit bundle for upstream strategic context.

installs.purpose: Orchestrator — single-creative + test-set modes, reads brand-audit for Strategic Layer
Map of how the 15 skills (across brand-audit + creative-deep-dive) chain together — kept next to the orchestrator for quick reference
Standalone callable — three-channel hook diagnostic (spoken / visual / text overlay)
Standalone callable — structured 10-point hook scoring from text inputs
Standalone callable — library of cognitive mechanisms
Standalone callable — full hook writing skill with 8 psychological triggers
Standalone callable — 35+ hook tactic definitions and deployment guidance
Standalone callable — native-feeling template swipe file
Standalone callable — format selection with funnel fit + mechanic pairing
Standalone callable — always-on copy rules (Out-Loud Test, reading level, AI-tell words, contractions, etc.)
Local routing index for saved deep dives
Global INDEX.md routing entry for the deep-dive library

changelog.notes: Foundation and Strategy layers extracted to brand-audit use case. Nine underlying skills now install as independent top-level skills, each independently callable. Orchestrator reads brand-audit/strategy.md for Strategic Layer rather than re-deriving. Strategy-cell match (validated / new test / drift) added to per-creative output frontmatter. Initial release of the 15-skill stack packaged from Alysha's uploaded creative-strategy framework, with orchestrator SKILL.md supporting both single-creative and test-set run modes.
